flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fresno Pacific University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (67.7% → 50.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fresno Pacific University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (55.5% → 44.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Fresno Pacific University rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Fresno Pacific University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (55.9% vs 63.8%).
